title: A Changing Reality For The European Coal Trade
section_path: A Changing Reality For The European Coal Trade
section_path_text: A Changing Reality For The European Coal Trade
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
Europe is rapidly heading for the deadline when the EU sanctions on imports of Russian coal become terminal. Imports have been allowed since the sanctions were announced a few months ago, but only under existing contracts, and no new deals were allowed to be signed. However, as of the tenth of August, that loophole will be permanently closed, and no Russian coal will be allowed to be discharged in the bloc's ports.
